title: stelis ozota
intro: Stelis ozota, also known as the Yellow Antbird Orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis ozota include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis ozota can be used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
